'''Halurian ice-boars''' were large, [[Swine|porcine]] [[Species/Legends|creatures]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to a location in the [[Haluria system/Legends|Haluria system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="Planetnamia" /> The creatures had thick [[Leather/Legends|hide]] plates that covered and protected their bodies.<ref name="CSWE" /> The plates were considered to be nearly impervious to such bladed tools as [[Knife/Legends|knives]]. When the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Skere Kaan]] attempted to [[Mind trick/Legends|dominate]] the mind of his fellow [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]], shortly before<ref name="Path of Destruction">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref> the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan|final battle]] of the [[New Sith Wars]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]],<ref name="TEA" /> Bane compared Kaan's efforts with a knife scraping against an ice-boar's hide plates.<ref name="Path of Destruction" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Halurian ice-boar was first mentioned in the [[2006]] novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'', written by [[Drew Karpyshyn]] as the second installment in the ''[[Star Wars: Darth Bane Trilogy]]'' series of novels.<ref name="Path of Destruction" />
